_axisNote: PC-10 axis regression: `existingTypeface` + tier gate. Pro tier honors `step6.existingTypeface` in Style Guide Typography; flipping `tier` to `core` exercises the suppression path. The per-tier assertion lives in `core-pdfs.test.ts` under `Style Guide Typography honors existingTypeface when provided (Pro tier only)` and `Core tier ignores existingTypeface for continuity copy and keeps specimen wordmark note when applicable`.

step2.customerArchetype: Solo creative ready to look as professional as their work
step2.painPoints: Inconsistent visuals and unclear offer language
step2.desiredOutcomes: A kit they can hand to collaborators and clients

step4.missionStatement: Help independents sound as good as they are.

step5.originSummary: Started as side projects that became the main thing.
step5.motivation: Saw peers struggle to describe what they do.

step6.existingTypeface: Montserrat for all headings; Inter for body copy

step7.differentiation: Pairs strategy with hands-on kit delivery so teams ship a coherent story fast.
